name: P-3 prompt-eval reports the dataset path on stderr for traceability
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 2>err.txt && grep -q 'evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl' err.txt && echo reported 1>&2
